title: Pidilite Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Pidilite Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
